FEIYAP_CARD_MI_WANG.title: Mi Wang
FEIYAP_CARD_MI_WANG.description:
Cannot be played until the quest is complete.
Complete after dealing [blue]{Goal}[/blue] damage with [gold]Attacks[/gold].
When played, remove this card and gain the Investigator relic.
(Progress: [blue]{Progress}[/blue]/[blue]{Goal}[/blue])

FEIYAP_CARD_FA_WEI.title: Fa Wei
FEIYAP_CARD_FA_WEI.description:
Cannot be played until the quest is complete.

(Progress: [blue]{Progress}[/blue]/[blue]{Goal}[/blue])

FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_XXI.title: XXI - World
FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_XXI.description:
[gold]Tarot - Upright[/gold]: Show all [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards except XXI - World. Choose 1 to create in your hand with 0 cost this turn.
[gold]Tarot - Reversed[/gold]: Costs 2 more. Show all [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards except XXI - World. Choose 3 to create in your hand with 0 cost this turn.
FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_XXI.selectionPrompt: Choose Tarot cards to create in your hand.
